title: Kth Smallest Amount With Single Denomination Combination
description: Return the k-th positive amount divisible by at least one coin denomination; amounts are not formed by adding different coins. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: coins: list[int], k: int. 1 <= len(coins) <=15; distinct values <=25; 1 <= k <=2e9; count the sorted union of multiples without duplicates.
output_contract: Return long using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
